prompt: A funny, high-energy photorealistic amusement park scene shot from directly behind a penguin riding alone in the front seat of a roller coaster. The animal is centered in the frame with both flippers raised in excitement, wearing a bright orange-red safety helmet and blue goggles. The coaster car is glossy red with yellow side panels and a black safety bar visible in the foreground. The camera angle is tight and immersive, as if seated just behind the rider, looking forward over its back. In the background, show a colorful seaside-style carnival in strong daylight with exactly 1 large Ferris wheel on the left, exactly 1 spinning swing ride near the upper right, and exactly 2 striped circus tent roofs visible on the right side. Use dramatic motion blur and radial streaking in the background to emphasize speed, while the rider and coaster car remain relatively sharp. Bright sunny sky, vivid saturated colors, playful absurdist humor, theme park excitement, crisp animal feather detail, cinematic action photography.
